summary: Excellent UltraMatrix matrix recording of a high‑energy MSG show featuring standout performances of China > Rider, Ship of Fools, Estimated > Terrapin and an all‑time favorite Sugar Magnolia.
review: The reviewer raves about the concert’s electric vibe, highlighting Jerry’s crisp rock‑and‑roll licks, Bob’s “rock star” presence and Brent’s keyboard texture while praising the drummers’ extra special contribution. The UltraMatrix source delivers a clear, well‑balanced sound that captures the band’s dynamics without noticeable flaws.

ai_rating.rationale: A single, detailed five‑star review praises both musical performance and recording quality; weighting favors the superb show, yielding a near‑perfect rating despite limited sample size.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls it "most excellent recording" with no complaints about clarity or balance; UltraMatrix mix captures both board detail and audience ambience.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Energy builds from the Hey Pocky Way>Minglewood opener through a series of snazzy pairings, never losing momentum; the second set’s transitions (e.g., Estimated>Terrapin into Drums/Space) keep the flow tight and engaging.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for laying down his best rock‑and‑roll licks and acting as the straight man to Bob's showmanship.
band_member_comments.Bob: Described as being in "full rock star mode", energizing the crowd with a grin during the SSDD segment.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent’s keyboard work is noted as part of the overall “Bobby and Brent show”, contributing to the concert’s special feel.
band_member_comments.Drums: Both drummers were highlighted as making the performance "extra special" with an engaging Drums/Space sequence.
